reach_why: Combines known issues; does not open wholly new territory beyond continual learning, TTA, and poisoning concerns.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links weak forgetting diagnostics, test-time residues, and replay poisoning via obscure but true inputs.
falsifiable_why: Test by measuring persistent state changes, replay-poison effects, and failures hidden by easy old-task evaluations.
explanation: Apparent stability may mask continual learning and replay-mediated vulnerability, especially under strange but genuine inputs.
